summary.archival_abstract: Official reference titled “SAGE Labs | Star Atlas.” This record preserves what Star Atlas / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
SAGE Labs | Star Atlas
0001.
SAGE Labs
SAGE Labs is where real economic gameplay happens. Fully on-chain, every action carries weight. Mine resources, craft gear, trade on open markets. Your decisions have lasting consequences in a persistent, player-driven economy.
Your browser does not support the video tag.
The Golden Era
SAGE represents the current era of Star Atlas, a time of expansion, opportunity, and economic growth. As players establish starbases, extract resources, and build the infrastructure of galactic civilization, they're writing the history that will define the future of Galia.
24/7
Economy
Real
Earnings
Web
Based
100%
On-Chain
Resource Mining
Extract valuable resources from asteroids and planets. Your mining operations fuel the crafting economy and generate income.
Multiple resource types
Varied mining locations
Fleet-based extraction
Automated operations
Crafting System
Transform raw materials into valuable items, components, and equipment. Supply the marketplace and build your manufacturing empire.
Comprehensive crafting
Recipe discovery
Component manufacturing
Market integration
SDU Scanning
Scan for Survey Data Units, valuable data packages that provide resources and information. SDU hunting is a unique gameplay loop.
Exploration gameplay
Random discoveries
Valuable rewards
Risk vs reward
Starbased Integration
SAGE Labs connects to the broader Starbased system. Your economic activities contribute to your faction's starbase network.
Starbase construction
Collaborative building
Faction progression
Loyalty rewards
Starting in SAGE Labs
Connect your Solana wallet with Star Atlas assets
Assign your ships to fleet operations
Begin mining operations at resource-rich locations
Process resources and craft valuable items
Sell on the Galactic Marketplace for ATLAS tokens
Build Your Economy
The Star Atlas economy runs on player activity. Every resource mined, item crafted, and trade executed shapes the galaxy. Start building in SAGE Labs.
Play Now
Explore More Features
